name: Dr Angelos Diamantopoulos
title: Senior Lecturer in Economics | Learning and Teaching Convenor
biography: He is a lecturer at SOAS, University of London, with extensive teaching experience across various subjects, including Microeconomics, Economic Theory, Mathematics for Economics, Statistics, and Econometrics. He is particularly passionate about teaching the mathematical aspects of Economics to students who may not have a strong mathematical background. His research primarily revolves around game theory, with a specific focus on information theory and networks.
research_interests: Microeconomic theory; Game theory; Information theory; Networks
